message:
style: fix 4 clippy warnings (collapsible match, redundant into_iter)

Collapse if-guards into match arm guards in causal.rs, tui.rs recipe
picker and tree navigation. Remove redundant .into_iter() in graph.rs
connected_open_components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
